title: deep-context runtime mirror parity
description: Create the two missing per-runtime mirrors of the native @deep-context analyzer agent (.claude/agents/deep-context.md and .codex/agents/deep-context.toml) so native seats dispatch in all three runtimes, and document the canonical-source + runtime-mirror convention in the deep-context and deep-loop-runtime skills. Commands/YAML are shared symlinks and dispatch the native seat by name; only the per-runtime agent files were missing.
